Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Petitions
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS' MOTION TO AMEND PETITIONS.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioners' motion to amend petitions is granted. Petitioners have leave to file First Amendment to Petition in case no. 514892 and case no. 514811 to add SaveMuni as a petitioner and plaintiff, subject to the express waiver of SaveMuni to seek to recuse the court or add new issues to the case. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (503/GLW)

CEQA CASE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No objection to the tentative ruling and tentative ruling adopted: Respondents' and real parties in interest's demurrer to third cause of action in the petition for writ of mandamus and complaint for reverse validation: the parties represent that petitioners and plaintiffs are dismissing the third cause of action, which makes the demurrer moot. No dismissal is on file. Parties submitted a stipulation and proposed order to dismiss the third cause of action prior to the hearing. Order signed in chambers. The demurrer was taken off calendar as moot. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Notice Of Application And Application For Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Denied

RULING:
PETITIONERS' APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: REMOVAL OF ACTION FROM EXPEDITED PROCEDURES

Hearing held. The Court made the following ruling: Petitioners' application for order to show cause re: removal of action from expedited procedures is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Renee Sera of HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOCIATES, CSR #7435 (415-337-2077) (503/GLW)
